text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: WOOHOO! I like anything that's fun!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It appears all of us
gathered here today have an aptitude
for charming people!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Not sure if it has anything
to do with attitude, but I'm always
down to have a good time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Why stay quiet when we could get the
crowd to make some noise?! Festivals, opera,
sepak takraw — you name it! I welcome all of
the above!☆

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah. While we're here, shall we form
a theater trio? We can call our troupe
the "Black Gold Opera O"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
BWAHAHA! Is it black or is it gold?
Opera O's not even a color!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A theater group? That sounds fun!
We better start practicing our singing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's try and sing in unison!
Ready? And —

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Mmm… We are cacophonous!
This, my friends, is art!
